chunks.text:
<!-- image -->

Nash County Board of Commissioners Recessed Meeting 
Wednesday, June 24, 2026, at 6 PM
Nash County Administration Building 
3 rd Floor – Frederick B. Cooper Jr. Commissioners Room
120 W. Washington Street
Nashville, NC 27856

1. Call the Board of Commissioners Meeting to Order – Chairman Marvin C. Arrington
2. Invocation – Commissioner Sue Leggett
3. Pledge of Allegiance – Commissioner J. Wayne Outlaw
4. Presentation of Proposed Unified Development Ordinance (UDO) Revisions – Adam Culpepper, WithersRavenel
5. Public Comments on Proposed Unified Development Ordinance (UDO) Revisions
6. Adjournment of Board of County Commissioners – Chairman Marvin C. Arrington
